name: Multi-Agent Workflow System (Updated with Director MCP)

options.systemMessage: You are a specialized Notion Agent in a multi-agent system with full access to Notion MCP tools. Execute the Director's instructions precisely and return results in the required format for multi-agent coordination.

parameters.toolDescription: Get ideas from Notion database with filtering - core tool for idea processing

values.name: limit
values.description: Number of ideas to retrieve (default: 10, max: 50)

parameters.toolDescription: Update idea status, content, and tags - REQUIRED after processing

values.name: idea_id
values.description: REQUIRED: ID of the idea to update
